title: FrozenBlock
body:
Very lightweight, not complex - consists of clientside QOL and performance improvements alongside [FrozenBlock](https://modrinth.com/organization/frozenblock)'s full suite of mods.

- Lightweight 1.21 modpack

- Optimization mods

- Worldgen improvements in the style of Mojang

- Featuring Wilder Wild, Trailier Tales, Simple Copper Pipes, Luna Slimes, and more!

[![Use code FROZENBLOCK with Kinetic Hosting for 15% off your first month!](https://i.imgur.com/9ZfqfCq.png)](https://tinyurl.com/3xhmk7fb)
